    SELECT "p1"."ProjectId", "p1"."UserId", "p1"."Role", "a0"."Id", "a0"."AvatarUrl", "a0"."Company", "a0"."Country", "a0"."CreatedAt", "a0"."Email", "a0"."FirstName", "a0"."FullName", "a0"."LastLoginAt", "a0"."LastName", "a0"."PasswordHash", "a0"."Phone", "a0"."ResetToken", "a0"."ResetTokenExpiry", "a0"."Timezone"
    FROM "ProjectMembers" AS "p1"
    INNER JOIN "AppUsers" AS "a0" ON "p1"."UserId" = "a0"."Id"
) AS "s" ON "p"."Id" = "s"."ProjectId"
WHERE "p"."OwnerId" = @userId OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM "ProjectMembers" AS "p0"
    WHERE "p"."Id" = "p0"."ProjectId" AND "p0"."UserId" = @userId)
ORDER BY "p"."CreatedAt" DESC, "p"."Id", "a"."Id", "s"."ProjectId", "s"."UserId"

INNER JOIN "AppUsers" AS "a" ON "p"."OwnerId" = "a"."Id"
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT "p1"."ProjectId", "p1"."UserId", "p1"."Role", "a0"."Id", "a0"."AvatarUrl", "a0"."Company", "a0"."Country", "a0"."CreatedAt", "a0"."Email", "a0"."FirstName", "a0"."FullName", "a0"."LastLoginAt", "a0"."LastName", "a0"."PasswordHash", "a0"."Phone", "a0"."ResetToken", "a0"."ResetTokenExpiry", "a0"."Timezone"
    FROM "ProjectMembers" AS "p1"
    INNER JOIN "AppUsers" AS "a0" ON "p1"."UserId" = "a0"."Id"

WHERE NOT ("r"."HasFired") AND "r"."FireAt" <= @upTo
ORDER BY "r"."FireAt"

WHERE NOT ("r"."HasFired") AND "r"."FireAt" <= @upTo
ORDER BY "r"."FireAt"

INNER JOIN "TaskItems" AS "t" ON "r"."TaskId" = "t"."Id"
INNER JOIN "AppUsers" AS "a" ON "r"."UserId" = "a"."Id"
WHERE NOT ("r"."HasFired") AND "r"."FireAt" <= @upTo
ORDER BY "r"."FireAt"
2026-04-12 23:58:41.371 +02:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (1ms) [Parameters=[@now='?' (Size = 28), @AddHours='?' (Size = 28)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT "t"."Id", "t"."AssigneeId", "t"."CreatedAt", "t"."Description", "t"."DueDate", "t"."IsStarred", "t"."Priority", "t"."ProjectId", "t"."Status", "t"."Title", "a"."Id", "a"."AvatarUrl", "a"."Company", "a"."Country", "a"."CreatedAt", "a"."Email", "a"."FirstName", "a"."FullName", "a"."LastLoginAt", "a"."LastName", "a"."PasswordHash", "a"."Phone", "a"."ResetToken", "a"."ResetTokenExpiry", "a"."Timezone"
FROM "TaskItems" AS "t"
LEFT JOIN "AppUsers" AS "a" ON "t"."AssigneeId" = "a"."Id"
WHERE "t"."AssigneeId" IS NOT NULL AND "t"."DueDate" IS NOT NULL AND "t"."DueDate" > @now AND "t"."DueDate" <= @AddHours AND "t"."Status" <> 'Completed'
